sabab: Termux-ku u ogola in uu faylasha telefoonka galo
Package-kan magaciisu khaldan yahay ama ma jiro
xal: Marka hore `pkg update` qor, kadibna isku day

sabab: Termux si sax ah uma rakibin
Termux-ku u ogola in uu faylasha galo ma haysato
Telefoonkaagu meel ka weyni ma haysato
xal: Faylasha aan lagama baahnayn tirtir, kadibna isku day
Apps kale xidh, kadibna isku day
